Patch release — more changelogs resolve, and a fix for updating from the old test builds.

## Added / Changed
- **Better changelog coverage:** ghcr.io images now resolve their changelog even without an OCI `source` label (ghcr.io/owner/repo → github.com/owner/repo), so more containers show a real changelog + version instead of an empty "latest".

## Fixed
- **Installer:** force-reinstall the package (`upgradepkg --reinstall`). The old date-versioned test builds (e.g. `2026.06.16.x`) registered a package that Slackware considered *newer* than `1.0.x`, so updates were skipped with "newer version already installed".

## Install / update

Coming from a date-versioned test build, do this once on the box to clear the stale package:

```
removepkg shiplog
installpkg /boot/config/plugins/shiplog/shiplog-1.0.3-x86_64-1.txz
/usr/local/emhttp/plugins/shiplog/scripts/rc.shiplog restart
```

(Or remove + reinstall the plugin from the URL.) From 1.0.3 on, normal Plugin updates work.

```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junkerderprovinz/shiplog/main/plugin/shiplog.plg
```
